74141.subject: 🐶📰 Weekend Update
74141.body:
**BTC** $60,755 (-2.3%) | **ETH** $1,555 (-6.5%) | **SOL** $62 (-5.5%)

———————————————————————————

Welcome to the Daily Bone Weekend Update where we recap the top stories from the  week. Be sure to check out our daily newsletter to get all of your news hot off the press each and every weekday!

———————————————————————————

### Headlines

* Over [$3B got liquidated](https://www.coinglass.com/liquidations) from the crypto market on as Bitcoin [fell below $60K](https://coinmarketcap.com/currencies/bitcoin/) on Friday

* [Strategy sold $2.3M](https://x.com/WuBlockchain/status/2061423542248366209?s=20) worth of Bitcoin for first time since 2022

* [Zcash wicked below $250](https://x.com/Tyler_Did_It/status/2062851566424432689?s=20) as team releases post-mortem of Orchard exploit, where hackers could have created unlimited ZEC tokens — Due to the security feature of Zcash there if [no way to cryptographically prove](https://x.com/zooko/status/2062644925590900980?s=20) whether the vulnerability was exploited

* Nvidia CEO called Marvell the [next trillion dollar company](https://x.com/tradfi/status/2061650323496976699?s=20) — MRVL gained [over 25%](https://finance.yahoo.com/quote/MRVL/) on the week— Marvell was [added to the S&P 500](https://finance.yahoo.com/markets/stocks/articles/marvell-joins-p-500-ai-031211444.html)

———————————————————————————

### Equities

* The S&P 500 and Dow Jones will [not be changing rules](https://x.com/JSeyff/status/2062647758603866453?s=20) to allow mega-IPOs coming this year to enter indices early

* MSTR is [down 24%](https://finance.yahoo.com/quote/MSTR/) on the week as STRC fell [to $90](https://finance.yahoo.com/quote/STRC/) — Strategy is now facing its [largest unrealized loss in history](https://x.com/KobeissiLetter/status/2062475802252365980?s=20)

* Bitmine’s unrealized [ETH losses](https://x.com/DegenerateNews/status/2061957912642060412?s=20) ballooned to $8.8B — Filed for [preferred stock offering](https://x.com/zoomerfied/status/2062288919853490553?s=20) that will yield 9.5% APY

* SpaceX released[ $75B IPO target ](https://x.com/DeItaone/status/2062499371460034996?s=20)with 555M shares available at an offering price of $135

———————————————————————————

### Crypto

* Pump Fun launched [Pump Fun Go](https://x.com/Pumpfun/status/2062557004829233504?s=20) bounty platform

* [HYPE flipped SOL](https://x.com/DegenerateNews/status/2062230370930622650?s=20) in price — Wall Street Journal published an [article](https://x.com/WuBlockchain/status/2062018665252639227?s=20) about Hyperliquid’s 24/7 trading platform

* [Clarity Act added](https://x.com/WatcherGuru/status/2061864525192659312?s=20) to Senate legislative calendar

* Polymarket completes [6 figure on-chain institutional hedge](https://x.com/Cointelegraph/status/2061857877925786081?s=20) tied to Nvidia GPU compute prices

———————————————————————————

### AI

* US and Japan announced a [$1B partnership](https://x

73968.subject: RE: Переклад.
73968.body:
Добрий день!
Можемо забезпечити переклади, але попередньо рекомендуємо проконсультуватись з церквою,  де буде проводитись обряд вінчання які документи необхідні для проведення цієї процедури.  

Адреса офісу:

 <https://www.google.com/maps/search/Torysk%C3%A1+3+040+11+Ko%C5%A1ice?entry=gmail&source=g> Toryská 3

 <https://www.google.com/maps/search/Torysk%C3%A1+3+040+11+Ko%C5%A1ice?entry=gmail&source=g> 040 11 Košice

2-й поверх, 110  кабінет

Робочі години – 8:00 – 16:00, пн-пт.

З повагою,

UA preklady s.r.o.

+421918635854





 

 

From: Oleg Novosadov <novosadovoleg@gmail.com> 
Sent: Tuesday, June 2, 2026 8:36 PM
To: info@ua-preklady.sk
Subject: Переклад.

 

Доброго дня, 

 

Цікавить переклад документів для вінчання у Словаччині.

 

Дякую. 

 

Гарного дня.

73274.subject: Svadobná výzdoba
73274.body:
Zdravíme nevestu💍🤍,

Ďakujeme veľmi pekne za vašu správu.. Termín svadby máme ešte voľný a veľmi
radi budeme súčasťou vašej svadby.🤍

Spravidla sa s klientami stretávame osobne v showroome v Rozhanovciach
(kúsok od Košíc) kde si spolu vieme vyskladať svadobnú výzdobu a na základe
toho vytvoriť cenovú ponuku na mieru pre vás ak by ste mali záujem prosím
navrhnite deň a čas kedy by vám to najviac vyhovovalo aby sa časovo radi
prispôsobíme vášmu času. Poprípade, ak sme mimo Košíc či Prešova, radi si s
Vami dohodneme videohovor. Prosím navrhnite deň a čas, ktorý by Vám
vyhovoval najviac, pokojne aj cez víkend aj vo večerných hodinách. 🙂
Najbližsie voľne termíny máme ešte aj tento týždeň. Forme stretnutia sa
radi prispôsobíme Vám, čo je pre Vás praktickejšie ☺️

Budeme sa tešiť na prípadnú spoluprácu s Vami.

S pozdravom

Lenka Gattiker,
Vaša osobná posh asistentka
